specs.title: GET /health returns HTTP 200
GET /health response body is non-empty
GET /api/search?q=test returns HTTP 200 with a valid token
GET /api/search?q=test returns application/json content-type
GET /api/search?q=test returns a JSON array or object
GET /api/dashboard/intel returns HTTP 200 when authenticated
GET /api/dashboard/intel response contains "counts" key
GET /api/dashboard/intel counts object has relationships and companies keys
GET /api/dashboard/intel without Authorization returns 401
GET /api/relationships without Authorization returns 401
GET /api/people without Authorization returns 401
login page renders the sign-in form with email, password, and submit button
successful login stores dl_token in localStorage and redirects away from /login
wrong credentials shows an error message or stays on /login
visiting /dashboard without a token redirects to /login
visiting /crm without a token redirects to /login
logout clears the token and redirects to /login
bulk-send page loads without redirecting to /login
page shows "Bulk Send" heading
top header and sidebar render
audience builder section is visible
compose / message area is present on page
"Send", "Preview", or "Continue" button exists in the workflow
company detail page shows entity header back link
company entity name is visible
company detail page shows a tab/subtab bar
the first subtab is active by default
clicking the Docs / Documents subtab switches content
clicking the Tax subtab switches content
Edit button is present in the entity header
clicking Edit opens a modal with company form fields
Docs tab: Upload button is present
Docs tab: content area loads (year folders, doc rows, or empty state)
Docs tab: when doc rows exist, they have a Download button (.btn-dl)
person detail page shows entity header with back link "← People"
person entity name heading is visible and non-empty
Edit button is visible in the entity header actions
tab bar renders all 7 expected tabs: Overview, Docs, Tax, Communication, Organizers, Workflow, Notes
"Overview" tab is active and #tab-overview has the active class by default
clicking "Docs" tab switches active tab to #tab-docs
clicking "Tax" tab switches active tab to #tab-tax
clicking "Communication" tab switches active tab
clicking "Notes" tab switches active tab to #tab-notes
clicking "Organizers" tab switches active tab to #tab-organizers
"Organizers" tab shows organizer content area
clicking "Workflow" tab switches active tab to #tab-workflow
"Workflow" tab shows Active Pipelines header or empty state
"Notes" tab shows Internal Notes textarea
clicking Edit opens the edit modal (modal-overlay visible)
Edit modal contains First Name input (#ef-fname)
Edit modal contains Last Name input (#ef-lname)
Edit modal Cancel button closes the modal
Docs tab: "↑ Upload Document" button is visible
Docs tab: clicking Upload button opens the upload modal
Docs tab: upload modal contains the file-drop zone (.file-drop)

Docs tab: document content area renders after loading (year folders, doc rows, or empty state)

entity back link "← Relationships" is visible
relationship name heading is visible and non-empty
entity badges (service tier / billing status) are rendered
tab bar is visible with at least "Overview" and one other tab

clicking a non-Overview tab marks it active
clicking "Companies" tab marks it active
clicking "Documents" tab marks it active
clicking "Notes" tab marks it active
Edit button is visible in entity actions
clicking Edit opens a modal with the relationship Name field
Edit modal has Service Tier and Billing Status selects
Overview tab content renders the overview panels

clicking "👤 People" tab shows People content and hides Relationships
clicking "🏢 Companies" tab shows Companies content and hides Relationships

"+ New Person" button is visible after switching to People tab

clicking a person table row navigates to /crm/person/:id
clicking a company table row navigates to /crm/company/:id

dashboard overview wrapper is rendered
